app.name: META System
app.institution: Ministry of Economy of El Salvador

footer.credits: Developed by CityWorks, Powered by Google Cloud Platform

session.idle_message: For security, your session will close due to inactivity in {seconds}s.

aup.title: Acceptable use and privacy notice
aup.intro: To access the META System you must read and accept the following usage terms and the processing of your data.
aup.point_1: You will use the system only for authorized institutional purposes of MINEC.
aup.point_2: You will protect your credentials and session; you will not share them with third parties.
aup.point_3: Your access and actions on data are recorded in the system log for security and audit purposes.
aup.point_4: Minimal personal data (name, institutional email and optional photo) is processed to operate the system, in line with the security policy.
aup.checkbox: I have read and accept the acceptable use notice and the processing of my data.

security.title: Automated security tests
security.subtitle: Self-assessment of the system's security posture (ISO 27001 A.8.29).

alerts.title: Security alerts
alerts.subtitle: Email of the ICT security team that receives notices on incidents (ISO 27001 A.8.16).
alerts.recipients_hint: Separate multiple emails with commas. If left empty, administrators are notified.
alerts.event_lockout: 5 failed password attempts at sign-in (brute-force lockout, with email and IP).
alerts.event_break_glass: Use of local administrative access (break-glass / Super Admin account).
alerts.event_privilege: Assignment of an administrative role (Super Admin or Administrator).
alerts.event_config: Changes to sensitive configuration (AI, SSO, email or the alerts themselves).
alerts.always_on: Security alerts are always on and cannot be disabled (ISO 27001 A.8.16).

access.title: Access review
access.subtitle: Periodic review of users, roles and activity (ISO 27001 A.5.18).

deps.title: Dependency analysis
deps.subtitle: Known vulnerabilities in dependencies (ISO 27001 A.8.8).
deps.unavailable: Live analysis is not available in this environment; it runs automatically in the CI pipeline.
deps.note_ci: The authoritative audit (PHP and JS) runs on every push and weekly in the CI pipeline.
deps.schedule_subtitle: How often the analysis runs automatically. When due, a PDF report is generated and emailed to the security team.
deps.never_reported: No report has been sent yet
deps.no_recipients: No recipients configured; administrators will be used. Set them up under Alerts.

https.label: Encryption in transit (HTTPS/HSTS)
https.detail: HSTS forces HTTPS in the browser.

debug.label: Debug mode disabled
debug.detail: APP_DEBUG must be false in production.

single_device.label: Single session per user
single_device.detail: Prevents simultaneous sessions on multiple devices.

idle.label: Idle timeout
idle.detail: The session expires after {minutes} min of inactivity.

password.label: Password policy
password.detail: At least {min} characters, with complexity and history.

aup.label: Acceptable use notice
aup.detail: Must be accepted on first access.

log_retention.label: Log retention
log_retention.detail: Kept for {days} days and purged daily.

accounts.label: Account status
accounts.detail: {blocked} blocked · {dormant} with no access in 90+ days.

config.title: System — Settings
config.subtitle: Manage the system's general configuration, modules and integrations.

connected.title: Online users
connected.subtitle: Active in the last 5 minutes
connected.empty: No users are online right now.
connected.error: Could not load the list of online users.

language.title: System language
language.description: Select the language for the interface and system messages. It applies to all users.
language.label: Language
language.note: When you change the language, the interface updates immediately.
language.confirm_message: This change applies the language across the WHOLE system and for ALL users. To continue, type «{word}» and press OK.

device.title: Session active on another device
device.intro: For security reasons, your account can only be active on one device at a time. We detected an open session on:
device.question: Do you want to continue on this device? The other session will be closed.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.subtitle: AI API provider and credentials for the presidential report and predictive alerts.
ai.models_hint: Models available for the selected provider.
ai.key_configured: A key is configured. It is kept if you leave the field empty.
ai.test_failed: The connection test could not be completed.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: Logos, images and visual identity colors of the system.
branding.field_logo_sidebar_hint: PNG or SVG with a transparent background. Displayed over the blue menu background.
branding.field_logo_login_hint: PNG or SVG. Appears on the sign-in card.
branding.field_favicon_hint: Square ICO, PNG or SVG (e.g. 32×32 or 64×64).
branding.color_sidebar_hint: Background color of the side menu.
branding.color_sidebar_hover_hint: Highlight for the active item and on hover.
branding.select_at_least_one: Select at least one file to save.
branding.colors_subtitle: Customize the left sidebar color and the system's primary color.

dashboard.title: Institutional Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Consolidated view of the public investment portfolio

kpis.title: Management indicators
kpis.subtitle: Institutional KPIs and their progress toward the target
kpis.search_placeholder: Search by indicator, key, or unit…
kpis.delete_message: Delete the indicator "{label}"? This action cannot be undone.

kpi_form.form_intro_before: Complete the information. Fields marked with
kpi_form.strategic_checkbox: Show on the Dashboard as a strategic indicator

logs.title: System Logs
logs.subtitle: Most recent records and updates in the system.
logs.search_placeholder: Search by user, action, section, detail…

mail.heading: Email
mail.subtitle: Sending provider (SMTP or Mailgun), test email, and recent events.
mail.webhook_desc: Set this URL in Mailgun to receive deliveries, bounces, and opens in the system logs.
mail.message_placeholder: Plain text. If the fields are left empty, the default values will be used.
mail.events_empty: No email events have been received yet.

memoirs.heading: Institutional Reports
memoirs.subtitle: AI-assisted generation powered by {provider} using data from the META platform
memoirs.engine_description: The system feeds the model with real project, budget, progress and goal data from the META platform to produce an institutional report draft ready for editorial review.
memoirs.model_data_title: Data that will be sent to the model:
memoirs.data_status: Status, progress and impact of each project
memoirs.empty_prompt_before: Configure an institution and period, then press
memoirs.history_empty: No reports have been generated yet.
memoirs.generate_error: The report could not be generated. Please try again.

minister.office_subtitle: Executive dashboard · Alerts, institutional status indicators and AI presidential report
minister.strategic_banner_summary: {projects} projects monitored · {institutions} affiliated institutions · {critical} require immediate attention
minister.no_projects_at_risk: No projects at risk of failure.
minister.no_priority_interventions: No priority interventions at this time.
minister.report_description: Select one or more institutions and the date range. The system will use the configured AI provider along with data from the META platform to draft an executive report addressed to the Office of the President of the Republic.
minister.generating_report_hint: This may take a few seconds. The report will download automatically when finished.
minister.traffic_light_hint: Click a colored number to see the projects in that state.

network.title: Managers Network
network.subtitle: Institutional chat for project alerts and follow-up
network.notify_hint: Publishes automatic alerts to the Alerts channel for all at-risk or delayed projects.
network.no_messages: There are no messages in this channel yet.
network.message_placeholder: Type a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a line break)

notifications.toggle_email_hint: Master switch for all system email delivery.
notifications.toggle_at_risk_hint: Notify when a project becomes at risk or falls behind.
notifications.toggle_updated_hint: Notify on changes to a project's progress or budget.
notifications.toggle_memoir_hint: Notify when an AI-generated report draft is created.
notifications.toggle_digest_hint: Send an executive summary every week.
notifications.recipients_hint: Comma-separated emails that will receive system notifications.
notifications.auto_subtitle: Generate and email reports recurrently to the responsible parties, without them logging in.
notifications.utc_note: The time is interpreted in the server time zone (UTC). Current time:
notifications.access_hint: Periodic reminder to review users and their access (ISO 27001 A.5.18).
notifications.roles_access: Sent to Super Admins and the additional emails you set.
notifications.risk_hint: Portfolio of at-risk projects with AI-generated recommendations, as PDF.
notifications.minister_hint: Executive AI report (dashboard + narrative) for the Minister, as PDF.
notifications.roles_risk: Sent to the Analyst and Project Manager roles, and the additional emails.
notifications.roles_minister: Sent to the Ministra role, and the additional emails.

predictive.page_subtitle: Success or failure prediction model based on physical progress, financial progress, risk and status
predictive.model_description: The model assesses each project's probability of success by combining the physical progress expected per schedule, the efficiency between progress and financial execution, the declared risk level and the operational status. Results are updated automatically with every progress report recorded on the platform.
predictive.risk_ranking_subtitle: Sorted from lowest to highest probability of success
predictive.no_projects: There are no projects to assess.
predictive.no_generations: No generations have been recorded for this project yet.
predictive.ai_error: The AI could not be queried. Please try again.
predictive.history_error: The generation history could not be loaded.

projects.page_subtitle: Complete portfolio of the Ministry and its affiliated institutions
projects.search_placeholder: Search by name, code, or manager...
projects.delete_confirm_message: Delete the project "{name}" ({code})? This action cannot be undone.

project_form.required_hint_prefix: Complete the information. Fields marked with

reports.title: Institutional Reports
reports.subtitle: Generation and export of executive reports

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.subtitle: Define roles and the access permissions assigned to users.
roles.delete_confirm: Delete the role "{name}"? Users will lose this role.

sso.title: Google Workspace SSO
sso.description: OAuth credentials for signing in with Google. Your IT administrator provides them from the Google Cloud Console.
sso.status_incomplete: Missing information: Google SSO is not yet complete.
sso.authorized_redirect_url_label: Authorized redirect URL (give it to IT)
sso.it_register_hint: IT must register this exact URL under «Authorized redirect URIs» of the OAuth client in the Google Cloud Console.
sso.secret_configured: A secret is configured. It is kept if you leave the field empty.
sso.redirect_uri_hint: It must match the URL authorized in the Google Cloud Console (usually the one above).
sso.hosted_domain_hint: Restricts access to accounts in this domain. Leave it empty to allow any Google account.

users.page_subtitle: Manage system users, their roles and institution.
users.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, institution or role…
users.no_roles: No roles available. Create them in Roles and permissions.
users.delete_message: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.no_review: No access review has been recorded yet.
users.block_message: Block access for "{name}"? They will not be able to sign in until unblocked.

backup.title: Automatic backups
backup.subtitle: Automatic database backup to a cloud storage account (ISO 27001 A.8.13).
backup.enable_hint: When enabled, the system generates and uploads a database copy on the configured schedule.
backup.weekly_hint: The weekly backup runs on Mondays at the given time.
backup.dropbox_token_hint: Simple alternative: direct access token. ⚠️ Dropbox "Generated access tokens" expire (~4 h); for automatic backups use the permanent connection above.
backup.gcs_credentials_hint: Paste the JSON key of a service account with write permission on the bucket (Storage Object Admin role).
backup.test_failed: The connection could not be tested.
backup.utc_note: The time is interpreted in the server time zone (UTC). Current server time:
backup.history_empty: No automatic backup has run yet.
backup.in_progress: A backup is in progress. The history will refresh automatically when it finishes.
backup.dropbox_oauth_hint: App key + App secret + Refresh token from a Dropbox app. Never expires: the system refreshes access on each backup. Get the refresh token via the OAuth flow (token_access_type=offline).
backup.oauth_assistant: Assistant: get the refresh token (no terminal)
backup.oauth_step1: Enter your App key and App secret above.
backup.oauth_step2: Click "Authorize in Dropbox", grant access and copy the code it shows.
backup.oauth_step3: Paste the code here and click "Exchange and save".
backup.oauth_save_first: If you entered a new App secret, the assistant uses it directly; no need to save first.

institutions.page_subtitle: Institution maintenance. Feeds the system’s Institution dropdown (active ones only).
institutions.search_placeholder: Search by code, name, acronym, type or sector…
institutions.delete_message: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
institutions.code_hint: The code is generated automatically from the acronym.

catalogs.page_subtitle: Administrable options for the system selectors (institution maintenance).
catalogs.in_use_hint: In use by institutions; cannot be deleted.
catalogs.code_subtitle: Format used to auto-generate the code when creating an institution.
